caveat: Rows are true pre-match forecasts when pre_match_snapshot is true. Rows without actual_available are forecast/imputed for display until the actual result is ingested.

prediction_audit.summary_line: Train on historical World Cup matches through 2022; audit every announced 2026 fixture with prediction timestamps and actual-result status.
